Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Strike Second Amended Petition For Writ Of Mandate Memo Of P & A And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Feb-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Respondents Patrick Henning in his capacity as Director of the California Employment Development Department, Bonnie Garcia in her capacity as Chair of the California Unemployment Insurance Appeals Board, Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger, in his capacity as Governor of the State of California, and Debbie Endsley, in her capacity as Acting Director of the California Department of Personnel Administration Motion to Strike portions of the Second Amended Petition for Writ of Mandate. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike granted in part and denied in part. Motion to strike granted with ten days leave to amend as to page 25, lines 17-18 "provisions of Art. 14, sec. 4 of the California Constitution" for petitioners in insert proper reference if they wish to do so. Motion granted without leave to amend as to page 25: paragraph 6; paragraph 4, line 13 "and salary reductions"; paragraph 5, line 19 "and subsequently reducing their salaries"; and paragraph 7, line 26 "and to cease and desist from any further salary reductions of EDD and CUIAB employees." Motion denied in all other respects. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797
